channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE: Global Crude Oil Prices Reach Highest In A Month As Middle East Conflict Reignites
item.description: US-Iran War Live Updates: The flare-up is the latest to undermine an interim agreement between Washington and Tehran aimed at ending their war, which has caused global economic shockwaves since it began in late February.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War Live Updates: The flare-up is the latest to undermine an interim agreement between Washington and Tehran aimed at ending their war, which has caused global economic shockwaves since it began in late February.

item.title: 6 Civilians Killed After Pakistan Forces Open Fire During Clashes In PoK

media:content.media:description: The latest violence has further intensified tensions in the region

item.description: Among those killed in Baloch Sadhunati district were Zahid Mughal, Zafar Mughal and Arsalan Akbar. The latest violence has further intensified tensions in the region, where resentment against Islamabad has been steadily increasing.
item.content:encoded: Among those killed in Baloch Sadhunati district were Zahid Mughal, Zafar Mughal and Arsalan Akbar. The latest violence has further intensified tensions in the region, where resentment against Islamabad has been steadily increasing.

item.title: More Millionaires Are Leaving New York For Florida And Texas, State Loses $11 Billion In Revenue

media:content.media:description: New York's share of the nation's millionaires fell from 12.7% in 2010 to 8.7% in 2022.

item.description: The report comes amid renewed debate over New York City mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani's proposal to raise taxes on the wealthy.
item.content:encoded: The report comes amid renewed debate over New York City mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani's proposal to raise taxes on the wealthy.

item.title: Trump Extends US Backing To Saudi Arabia To Take On Iran-backed Houthis

media:content.media:description: So far, neither Riyadh nor Washington has officially commented on the matter

item.description: But the mere fact that MBS notified Trump in advance about the Saudi strike on Sanaa airport and asked for his backing signals the kingdom's concern that any larger conflict with the Houthis could require US military and diplomatic backing.
item.content:encoded: But the mere fact that MBS notified Trump in advance about the Saudi strike on Sanaa airport and asked for his backing signals the kingdom's concern that any larger conflict with the Houthis could require US military and diplomatic backing.

item.title: Trump Wants To Pass Crypto Bill As Tribute To Lindsey Graham: What Is It

media:content.media:description: Crypto companies say clear regulations will increase investor confidence and help the industry grow.

item.description: The Clarity Act is proposed US federal legislation designed to create a comprehensive regulatory framework for cryptocurrencies and digital assets.
item.content:encoded: The Clarity Act is proposed US federal legislation designed to create a comprehensive regulatory framework for cryptocurrencies and digital assets.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | A Quiet Indo-Pacific Revolution Is Underway, And India Is At Its Centre
item.description: America's unpredictability has finally done what the China threat never could for the Indo-Pacific
item.content:encoded: America's unpredictability has finally done what the China threat never could for the Indo-Pacific

item.title: How Flammable Decor, Lax Rules Turned Bangkok Pub Into A Death Trap

media:content.media:description: Search team found victims lying around the toilets at the back of the Bangkok pub.

item.description: Bangkok Pub Fire: At least 30 people have died and 24 out of 75 remain critically injured.
item.content:encoded: Bangkok Pub Fire: At least 30 people have died and 24 out of 75 remain critically injured.

item.title: US To Witness Sweltering Heat, Record Overnight Temperatures This Week

media:content.media:description: Health experts say overnight temperatures that fail to cool down are even more dangerous

item.description: A relentless heat dome will keep overnight temperatures dangerously high across the US this week, raising heatstroke risk for millions nationwide
item.content:encoded: A relentless heat dome will keep overnight temperatures dangerously high across the US this week, raising heatstroke risk for millions nationwide

item.title: India's Strong Message To Iran After Sailor's Death In Hormuz Ship Strike

media:content.media:description: The attackkilledanIndiancrew member aboard the Mombasa

item.description: According to the report, the tankers, Mombasa and Al Bahiyah, were struck while transiting the southern passage of the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: According to the report, the tankers, Mombasa and Al Bahiyah, were struck while transiting the southern passage of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Hours Before Death, Lindsey Graham Joked 'I Can't Die Now'

media:content.media:description: The South Carolina senator had spoken with Trump on Saturday evening

item.description: Graham's final conversations reportedly focused on his recent visit to Ukraine and a bipartisan sanctions package aimed at increasing pressure on Russia.
item.content:encoded: Graham's final conversations reportedly focused on his recent visit to Ukraine and a bipartisan sanctions package aimed at increasing pressure on Russia.

item.title: UAE Plans New Port On 'East Coast' To Avoid Iran Fire In Hormuz

media:content.media:description: Shifting some of the port's capacity outside Dubai would mark a seismic shift for the UAE

item.description: The new port is also likely to deepen DP World's penetration in the Gulf of Oman, allowing shipments to travel in and out of the country without needing to pass through the narrow waterway between Oman and Iran.
item.content:encoded: The new port is also likely to deepen DP World's penetration in the Gulf of Oman, allowing shipments to travel in and out of the country without needing to pass through the narrow waterway between Oman and Iran.

item.title: How Ground Robots Became Ukraine's New Frontline Force

media:content.media:description: Robots are now capable of escorting surrendering Russian soldiers away.

item.description: Ground robots are now delivering supplies, rescuing the wounded and even taking part in combat missions across Ukraine.
item.content:encoded: Ground robots are now delivering supplies, rescuing the wounded and even taking part in combat missions across Ukraine.

item.title: "Sheikh Hasina Will Have To Go To Jail": Bangladesh Minister On Exiled Ex-PM

media:content.media:description: Sheikh Hasina plans to return to Bangladesh 'without any fear of death.'

item.description: "Wherever Sheikh Hasina surrenders, whether in India or Bangladesh, she will have to go to jail first," said State Minister for Foreign Affairs Shama Obaed Islam.
item.content:encoded: "Wherever Sheikh Hasina surrenders, whether in India or Bangladesh, she will have to go to jail first," said State Minister for Foreign Affairs Shama Obaed Islam.

item.title: How Israel's Plan To Bring Iran Ex-President Ahmadinejad To Power Failed

media:content.media:description: Mahmoud Ahmadinejad's relationship with Iranian leadership became strained after he left office in 2013.

item.description: American, Iranian, and former intelligence officials claimed that Israel's spy agency, Mossad, tried to build a relationship with Ahmadinejad after he fell out with Iran's current leadership.
item.content:encoded: American, Iranian, and former intelligence officials claimed that Israel's spy agency, Mossad, tried to build a relationship with Ahmadinejad after he fell out with Iran's current leadership.

item.title: "Dropped Afghan Prisoners From Forklift For Fun": British Soldiers Accused Of Abuse In Explosive Inquiry

media:content.media:description: The investigation goes on, and more witnesses are to give their evidence.

item.description: The allegations came to light during the Afghanistan Inquiry, which is examining claims that UK Special Forces unlawfully killed civilians during operations in Afghanistan between 2010 and 2013.
item.content:encoded: The allegations came to light during the Afghanistan Inquiry, which is examining claims that UK Special Forces unlawfully killed civilians during operations in Afghanistan between 2010 and 2013.

item.title: "Within 3 Minutes, It Flipped", Recalls Vietnam Boat Tragedy Survivor

media:content.media:description: The survivor said that a violent wave capsized their closed speed boat.

item.description: Nirmal Kumar, one of the survivors, revealed that the boat went upside down within three minutes of boarding and barely crossing 300 meters.
item.content:encoded: Nirmal Kumar, one of the survivors, revealed that the boat went upside down within three minutes of boarding and barely crossing 300 meters.

item.title: Exposed By Husband, US Teacher Pleads Guilty To Sexual Abuse Of Student. Now Divorce Looms

media:content.media:description: Following her arrest, Naught apologised and acknowledged her conduct was inappropriate.

item.description: The teenager told investigators that the teacher initiated the relationship by flirting with him and sending him late-night messages while her husband was asleep.
item.content:encoded: The teenager told investigators that the teacher initiated the relationship by flirting with him and sending him late-night messages while her husband was asleep.

item.title: Man Behind Bangladesh's Tallest Ram Statue Arrested On Fraud Charges

media:content.media:description: Haridas Chandra Tarani Das was arrested in the late hours of July 12.

item.description: Das, who had proposed building an 81-foot statue of Lord Ram at the Sri Sri Radha Gobinda Kali Temple in Palashbari in Gaibandha, has been arrested in a money laundering case involving suspicious financial transactions worth Tk9.35 crore.
item.content:encoded: Das, who had proposed building an 81-foot statue of Lord Ram at the Sri Sri Radha Gobinda Kali Temple in Palashbari in Gaibandha, has been arrested in a money laundering case involving suspicious financial transactions worth Tk9.35 crore.

item.title: OpenAI Seeks $1 Million From Musk's xAI Over Dismissed Trade Secret Lawsuit

media:content.media:description: "xAI sued OpenAI first and looked for evidence later," OpenAI's lawyers wrote.

item.description: OpenAI filed its request Monday, hours after the xAI gave notice to appeal its claim that OpenAI poached employees and stole confidential information.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI filed its request Monday, hours after the xAI gave notice to appeal its claim that OpenAI poached employees and stole confidential information.

item.title: Goa, Bengaluru, UP: Ex-US Navy Man Spent Months In India Without Passport

media:content.media:description: Brown was attempting to travel to Nepal when the SSB apprehended him

item.description: Brown's arrest has triggered fresh security concerns over the growing number of foreign nationals allegedly moving across India under suspicious circumstances.
item.content:encoded: Brown's arrest has triggered fresh security concerns over the growing number of foreign nationals allegedly moving across India under suspicious circumstances.
